Package com.kbtu.university.model.academic

Class Mark

java.lang.Object
com.kbtu.university.model.academic.Mark
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<Mark>
public class Mark extends Object implements Comparable<Mark>, Serializable
A grade for a single course consisting of two attestations and a final exam. Implements Comparable so collections of marks sort by total score.
See Also:
